symptoms.name: constipation
symptoms.description: Infrequent or difficult bowel movements, often with hard or dry stool

symptoms.name: gastrocolic reflex
symptoms.description: When food or drink — coffee especially — enters the stomach, the stomach sends signals that trigger contractions in the colon

symptoms.name: bloating
symptoms.description: A feeling of fullness or swelling in the abdomen, often from gas

symptoms.name: headache
symptoms.description: Pain or pressure in the head, ranging from dull ache to sharp throbbing

symptoms.name: fatigue
symptoms.description: Extreme tiredness that rest doesn't fully relieve

symptoms.name: cramps
symptoms.description: Painful, involuntary muscle contractions in the abdomen

symptoms.name: nausea
symptoms.description: An uncomfortable urge to vomit, often accompanied by stomach unease
